scripts.build:miniprogram: npx -y -p typescript@5.4.5 tsc --project tsconfig.json && node scripts/sync-wxss.mjs
scripts.check: npm test && npx -y -p typescript@5.4.5 tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && node --check cloudfunctions/hlApi/index.js && node --check cloudfunctions/hlApi/auth-policy.js && node --check cloudfunctions/hlApi/membership-payment-policy.js && node --check cloudfunctions/hlApi/relationship-policy.js && node scripts/verify-admin-workflows.mjs
